notes: S-B step authority. All 8 WPs approved by reviewer-renata (opus). Aggregate gate green: DRG 280/757/10 fresh (0-delta), tests/architectural 1016 passed, doctrine+runtime+charter passed (16 xfail = deliberate prompt-emptiness gaps for S-C), ruff clean, mypy S-B-surfaces clean. Pre-existing-main reds (tests/agent template-not-found, sphinx, flaky sync) are outside the mission's declared gate — see traces/tooling-friction.md.

criteria.description: step.yaml (MissionStep) is the single authority for a mission type's steps
criteria.evidence: WP01 commit f2e0a25e (schema) + WP03 commit 33c41c8d (sw-dev data); MissionTypeRepository.default() resolves via projection

criteria.description: action_sequence derived as a read-projection; removed from YAML
criteria.evidence: WP02 commit 42589b75 (projection+injection) + WP07 commit 4326078b (YAML removal); test_step_projection.py, test_runtime_seam.py

criteria.description: template_set derived as a read-projection (artifact-key keyed); removed from YAML
criteria.evidence: WP02 commit 42589b75 + WP07 commit 4326078b; artifact-key keying verified (spec != specify)

criteria.description: DRG extractor emits mission-type/step edges from the projection (builtin-only, filtered)
criteria.evidence: WP04 commit fd1b106d; test_extractor_projection.py; DRG 280/757/10 byte-identical

criteria.description: All 4 types unified onto the mission-steps/<type>/<step>/ layout
criteria.evidence: WP05 commit 80bf6677; test_referential_integrity.py; software-dev + 3 authored types

criteria.description: recommended_model_tier net-new advisory field on MissionStep
criteria.evidence: WP01 commit f2e0a25e; registered in _STEP_YAML_TO_MODEL; test_step_schema.py round-trip

criteria.description: template reference (artifact_key, template_file) on the step schema
criteria.evidence: WP01 commit f2e0a25e (MissionStepTemplateRef) + WP03 commit 33c41c8d (sw-dev refs)

criteria.description: Override seam: recommended_model_tier is an advisory offer; charter/runtime override wins
criteria.evidence: WP08 commit cedf2835; step_offer_seam.py + evaluator.py live consumer; test_override_precedence.py (override-wins-on-disagreement)

criteria.description: Governing-doctrine scope edges retained (in_action_sequence:false steps stay non-orphan)
criteria.evidence: WP04 commit fd1b106d; test_extractor_projection.py asserts non-sequence steps mint no requires edge; orphans stay 10

criteria.description: All flat-form authority reads switched to the cached projection seam (no 5th authority)
criteria.evidence: WP06 commit 4bd54d88; _resolve_action_slot/_resolve_template_set_slot on the injected model; test_runtime_seam.py transitivity + extends-fallback

criteria.description: Missing prompt/exemplar content surfaced by red (xfail) tests, not invented
criteria.evidence: WP05 commit 80bf6677; test_prompt_emptiness.py — 16 named xfail(strict=False), anti-vacuity + drift guards; prompt.md files are 0 bytes

criteria.description: Order + membership relocated onto the step (sequence_index + in_action_sequence)
criteria.evidence: WP01 commit f2e0a25e (schema) + WP03 commit 33c41c8d (sw-dev 12 step.yaml); projection sorts by sequence_index
